title: MailerLite vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Omnisend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
intro: MailerLite and Omnisend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different needs. MailerLite focuses on simplicity for small businesses and freelancers, while Omnisend specializes in e-commerce with integrated SMS and push notifications. We'll help you determine which platform is the better fit for your goals.
choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer wanting an affordable, easy-to-use email platform with a generous free tier
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys integrated into your email marketing tool
You want the lowest entry price and prefer simplicity over advanced omnichannel features
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need email, SMS, and push notifications in one platform
You require advanced segmentation and pre-built e-commerce workflows like product recommendations
You want omnichannel automation to reach customers across multiple channels simultaneously

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for general small businesses seeking simplicity and affordability, with excellent ratings (4.6 on G2). Omnisend is better for e-commerce brands needing multichannel capabilities like SMS and push notifications. Both have strong customer satisfaction ratings.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Omnisend?
faq.a: MailerLite is cheaper overall. Its free plan supports 1,000 subscribers versus Omnisend's 250, and paid plans start at $9/month compared to Omnisend's $16/month. However, Omnisend's pricing may offer better value if you need SMS functionality, as adding SMS through other platforms would cost extra.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports and integrations with third-party migration tools. Most email marketing platforms allow you to import subscriber lists via CSV files. MailerLite's support team can assist with data migration during the transition process.
